title: OptimizedFPS
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e9db162f08ef79b796884f93a1858d442689fec.png)          
Are you looking to enhance your Minecraft experience with smoother gameplay and higher frame rates? OptimizedFPS is the perfect solution for players who demand performance without compromising quality. This modpack includes Sodium and a collection of optimization mods designed to maximize your FPS and minimize lag


<details>
<summary>Mods Included</summary>

</details>

> 1. Sodium
> 2. Entity Culling
> 3. Sodium Extra
> 4. Lithium
> 5. Nividium
> 6. Reese's Sodium Options
> 7. Sodium Extra
> 8. LazyDFU
> 9. Let Me Despawn 
> 10. AND MORE!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

New Versions Coming Soon :)

</details>
